title: rhinanthus major f. serotinus
intro: Rhinanthus major f. serotinus, also known as the late flowering yellow rampion, is a perennial flowering plant that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Rhinanthus major f. serotinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
